translations.en: an enormous woman, both in size and personality.
translations.zh: 一位體型與個性皆無比巨大的女子。

translations.en: !" she screams as she strides over to you with beer mugs in her hands.
translations.zh: ！」她大叫著，手持幾杯啤酒大步走來。

translations.en: "Welcome to the Slaughtered Lamb. What can I get you?"
translations.zh: 「歡迎光臨宰羊酒館。要些什麼？」

translations.en: "I'm very pleased to meet you," she purrs.
translations.zh: 「吾非常高興認識你，」她呼嚕著說道。

translations.en: "Yes. Them's who I beat at arm @wrestling call me Miss Barlap, though. Out of respect." She laughs.
translations.zh: 「是的。那些被吾在@掰手腕中打敗的人叫吾巴拉普小姐，表示尊重。」她笑著說。

translations.en: "Alright, alright, I admit it - ya won fair an' square."
translations.zh: 「好吧，好吧，吾承認——汝贏得光明正大。」

translations.en: "Now don't feel bad, sugar, lots of folks lose to Andrea!" She laughs heartily.
translations.zh: 「別灰心，甜心，輸給安德瑞的人多著呢！」她開懷大笑。

translations.en: She looks you up and down and then feels your arm. "Care for a match?"
translations.zh: 她打量汝一番，然後捏了捏汝的手臂。「要來一場嗎？」

translations.en: "Honey, I've had many jobs in my time. But runnin' this pub is the best, 'cause I get to meet the strongest @men."
translations.zh: 「親愛的，吾這輩子做過許多行業。但經營這家酒館最棒，因為吾能遇到最強壯的@男人。」
「吾售賣@排骨、@麥酒、@蜂蜜酒、@葡萄酒及@口糧。」
「要@排骨、@麥酒、@蜂蜜酒、@葡萄酒，還是@口糧？」

translations.en: "Look around. Here you'll find the men whose lives have lead them to many dangerous places."
translations.zh: 「看看四周。在這裡汝能遇到那些闖蕩過諸多險境的男人。」

translations.en: Someone in a dark corner shouts "Like this pub!" and all the patrons laugh.
translations.zh: 角落某人大喊：「就像這家酒館！」眾人哄堂大笑。

translations.en: "A little girlie-man. But he does make some fine clothes."
translations.zh: 「一個娘娘腔的小男人。但他確實做得一手好衣裳。」

translations.en: "Now there's a man." She looks into a beer mug and fixes her hair.
translations.zh: 「那才是條漢子。」她瞅著一杯啤酒，整了整頭髮。

translations.en: "I wish he'd come into town more often."
"That old witch? She may not have hit the bottle, but I believe a few have hit her."
translations.zh: 「那個老巫婆？她或許沒有酗酒，但吾相信有幾個人打過她。」
周圍的顧客都輕笑起來。

translations.en: "I've never seen any creature that could scare me. I say if they want trouble, come in this pub!"
translations.zh: 「吾從未見過任何能嚇到吾的生靈。吾說，想找麻煩的就來這酒館！」

translations.en: The men around her let out a cheer and she turns, acknowledging them with a bow.
translations.zh: 周圍的男人們歡呼起來，她轉身鞠躬致意。

translations.en: "He's never been in here. Can't imagine why--it seems like his kind of establishment."
translations.zh: 「他從未踏足此地。吾實在想不通——這地方似乎很合他的胃口。」

translations.en: "So long. Come back when you're thirsty."
"And if you see that cutie Utomo, tell him Andrea says hi."
translations.zh: 「如果汝見到那個可愛的烏托莫，告訴他安德瑞問候他。」

translations.en: "Yer on!" She grabs your arm and the contest begins!
translations.zh: 「說定了！」她抓住汝的手臂，比賽開始！

translations.en: "You don't have room to carry it."
"You don't have room to carry it."
"Rations are 4 gold apiece. How many do you want?"
translations.zh: 「口糧每份 4 枚金幣。汝要幾份？」

translations.en: $N looks at $Y. "You haven't any room in your pack."
translations.zh: $N 望向 $Y。「汝的背包已無空間。」
她給了 $Y #9 份羊肉口糧。

translator_notes: 安德瑞是個大嗓門、愛掰手腕的女酒館老闆，語氣熱情豪放。她暗戀大班（Big Ben）、討厭勒納德（Le'nard）。各種暱稱（sugar/sweetie/honey/dear）保留溫柔肉麻感。
